name: com.asciidoc.joplin-plugin
description: AsciiDoc note-taking with live preview for Joplin
author: fumetodev

scripts.build: webpack --mode=production && cd dist && tar -czf ../com.asciidoc.joplin-plugin.jpl * && cp ../com.asciidoc.joplin-plugin.jpl ~/.config/joplindev-desktop/plugins/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../com.asciidoc.joplin-plugin.jpl ~/.config/joplin-desktop/plugins/ 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.config/joplindev-desktop/cache/com.asciidoc.joplin-plugin/ 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.config/joplin-desktop/cache/com.asciidoc.joplin-plugin/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'Deployed to Joplin'
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && mkdir -p publish && cp com.asciidoc.joplin-plugin.jpl publish/
